metadata.description: Marketing plugins for Claude Code and Cowork

plugins.name: digital-marketing-pro
plugins.description: End-to-end digital marketing engagement methodology. v3.0 introduced the 12-Part Strategy Flow producing the Four Core Documents (61 explicit steps), Two-Views Model, Decision Matrix, and Living Project Instruction File on top of 25 agents, 141 skills, 65 scripts, and 14 HTTP connectors. v3.1 ships zero global hooks for clean multi-plugin coexistence (the prior mcp_.* matcher used to gate every MCP call from every installed plugin).

plugins.name: contentforge
plugins.description: Enterprise content production pipeline with 13 agents, 19 skills, and 9 opt-in HTTP connectors. v3.9 ships a world-class humanizer (29-pattern AI-detection catalog adapted from Wikipedia: Signs of AI writing + blader/humanizer, with self-critique meta-pass and optional voice calibration) plus multi-plugin coexistence fixes (zero global hooks, zero auto-connecting MCP servers).

plugins.name: socialforge
plugins.description: Agency-grade social media calendar automation with asset-first compositing, AI image generation (Vertex AI / Nano Banana Pro), and video generation (WaveSpeed / Kling v3.0 Pro). 19 commands, 15 skills, 5 agents, 18 scripts, 10 HTTP connectors. v1.5 ships zero global hooks for clean multi-plugin coexistence — credential status now via /sf:status on demand.
